name: mural-skills-pack
description: Four Mural skills: muralize (conversation -> infographic + board-spec), mural-image-rebuilder (image -> reconstructed Mural board), mural-local-driver (drive an open Mural board 100% locally through the browser, no API/MCP), and mural-retro-recycler (duplicate a retro/workshop board and empty it for the next cycle).
